original: As you take a moment to check out the yeen raider, the first thing that catches your attention are his massive balls. They’re so large that his crotch-flap utterly fails to conceal their underside. They spill into plain view with his slightest movement, and the only thing that gives him a semblance of decency is his dark underwear, whose color blends with the crotch-flap to create the appearance of something that passes for pants on a cursory glance. Following that, your gaze goes to his broad hips and ass. Looking at so many acres of bubblebutt, even a saint would be tempted to grab it, give it a smack, or preferably both. It’s hard to pay attention to the rest of him when he’s got such whopping assets drawing the eye like magnets, but once you manage to stop staring at his waist level, you realize that the boy’s got a lot more going for him. For starters, his body is quite athletic, lined with muscles that are visible but not overly defined. His pecs, in particular, look quite beefy, and the yellow-gray fur on his forelimbs does a great job of framing his biceps and thighs. Even more impressive, however, is the fact that you can’t spot a single scar on his chocolate skin — for a raider, that would mean he’s either extremely good at his job, or extremely lucky. Or maybe hyraxi medicine is simply more advanced than you gave it credit for. Last but not least, your eyes fall on his visage: the raider’s face is androgynous and pretty, with a hint of masculinity on his jawline that gives him a slightly boyish look. It is framed by a purple mane of fashionably-shaggy hair reaching down to his neck, while bangs cover part of his brow and left eye, making the yeen look more like a pop idol than someone you would find on Phaedra. To top it off, his big mouth is always curled into some kind of cocky smile, giving the raider a resting brat face that is thematically matched by his choker. It has the letters B.R.A.T. engraved on a golden plate, complete with a loop for someone to pass a leash through. For a self-proclaimed alpha, he has an... interesting taste in accessories. As your gaze meets his vibrant light-green eyes, the boy gives you a wink and wiggles his hyena ears happily. “Done looking?
